title: Shulker Raise
description: Makes shulker boxes push the block over them up
body:
This mod makes blocks go up when a shulker box is opened.

![Multiple blocks being raised by the shulker boxes being opened. Note that the vines do not go up.](https://github.com/Pedro270707/shulker-raise/blob/v1.0.0+1.20.4/showcase.png?raw=true)

It also has compatibility with Sodium and, consequently, Nvidium and Iris.
